Meta.title: Ilona Hakalo — Shopify Developer
Meta.description: Frontend developer building custom Shopify storefronts on Liquid and Hydrogen. 6+ years of production experience with React, TypeScript and headless commerce.

Hero.headline: I build Shopify storefronts that don't feel like Shopify.
Hero.subhead: Custom Liquid themes and Hydrogen headless storefronts for DTC brands. 6+ years in production, working solo and end-to-end.

Footer.tagline: Built with care in Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This page doesn't exist yet — or it took the day off.

Services.title: Four ways I help Shopify brands
Services.note: every project is end-to-end, no agency overhead

page.title: Shopify, end-to-end
page.subhead: From custom Liquid themes to fully headless Hydrogen storefronts, app stack design, and performance work. Every engagement is direct — founder to developer, no middle layer.

liquid.title: Custom Liquid Themes
liquid.description: Bespoke Shopify storefronts built from scratch — or rebuilt out of generic templates — on Online Store 2.0. Sections, blocks, metaobjects, custom product templates, complex discount logic.

hydrogen.title: Headless with Hydrogen
hydrogen.description: Full headless storefronts on Shopify Hydrogen + Remix — for brands that have outgrown Liquid. Faster pages, richer UX, full design freedom via the Storefront API.

apps.title: App Stack & Integrations
apps.description: Picking and wiring the right Shopify apps for the job — Sika, Klaviyo, Recharge, Stripe, Builder.io, Mixpanel — instead of bloating the store with apps the brand doesn't need.

performance.title: Performance & Migrations
performance.description: Fixing slow themes, migrating from Liquid to Hydrogen, optimizing Core Web Vitals, and bringing storefronts back into the green on Lighthouse.

AboutSnippet.title: Six years of building. One year deep on Shopify.
AboutSnippet.body: I'm a frontend developer with 6+ years of production experience across e-commerce, fintech, healthcare and SaaS. For the past year I've gone deep on Shopify — both classic Liquid and modern Hydrogen — and it's become my main craft. I work solo and end-to-end: from the first founder call to the live storefront.

Process.title: From idea to live storefront in four steps

discovery.title: Discovery call
discovery.description: We jump on a 30-minute call. You tell me the goal, the timeline, and the constraints. I tell you what's realistic and where I see risks.

scope.title: Scope & estimate
scope.description: I write a focused scope doc with milestones, deliverables, and a fixed-price or hourly estimate. No fluff, no surprises.

build.title: Build in the open
build.description: I ship in small, demoable chunks on a staging URL. You see progress every few days. Tight feedback loop, no telephone game.

ship.title: Ship & support
ship.description: Launch day plan, a healthy QA pass, and 30 days of post-launch support included. After that, an optional retainer if you want me around.

CTABanner.title: Got a Shopify project on your hands?
CTABanner.subtitle: I'm taking on a small number of new engagements — custom theme builds, headless migrations, and ongoing development partnerships.
